parameters.query: SELECT id, tier, score FROM inbound_leads WHERE idempotency_key = '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}' LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 600, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a B2B sales qualification assistant for ColdIQ, a GTM agency that helps B2B tech companies build outbound systems. Evaluate how well this lead matches our Ideal Customer Profile.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Evaluate this inbound lead for ICP fit:

Name: ' + $json.name + '
Company: ' + $json.company + '
Role: ' + $json.role + '
Company Size: ' + $json.company_size + '
Budget: ' + $json.budget + '
Message: ' + $json.message + '

Return JSON with: icp_score (1-10), fit_reasons (array of strings), concerns (array of strings), recommended_approach (string), personalization_hooks (array of strings). Only return valid JSON, no markdown.' }] }) }}

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO inbound_leads (email, name, company, role, company_size, budget, message, source, score, tier, icp_match, scoring_breakdown, idempotency_key, processed_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.email }}', '{{ ($json.name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.company || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.role || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.company_size }}', '{{ $json.budget }}', '{{ ($json.message || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.source }}', {{ $json.score }}, '{{ $json.tier }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.icp_match).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.scoring_breakdown).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}', NOW()) RETURNING id

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 600, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a friendly sales assistant for ColdIQ. Write a brief, personalized email reply to an inbound lead. Be warm but professional. Reference something specific from their message. Keep it under 100 words. End with a soft CTA to book a call.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Lead info:
Name: ' + $('Route Lead').first().json.name + '
Company: ' + $('Route Lead').first().json.company + '
Role: ' + $('Route Lead').first().json.role + '
Message: ' + $('Route Lead').first().json.message + '

Write a reply email. Return JSON with: subject (string), body (string). Only valid JSON.' }] }) }}

parameters.query: =UPDATE inbound_leads SET routed_to = '{{ $json.routed_to }}', auto_reply = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.auto_reply).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, auto_reply_sent = true, processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.id }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'processed', lead_id: $('Route Lead').first().json.id, score: $('Route Lead').first().json.score, tier: $('Route Lead').first().json.tier, routed_to: $('Route Lead').first().json.routed_to, icp_match: $('Route Lead').first().json.icp_match, auto_reply: $('Parse Auto Reply').first().json.auto_reply }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE inbound_leads SET routed_to = '{{ $json.routed_to }}', auto_reply_sent = false, processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.id }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'processed', lead_id: $('Route Lead').first().json.id, score: $('Route Lead').first().json.score, tier: $('Route Lead').first().json.tier, routed_to: $('Route Lead').first().json.routed_to, icp_match: $('Route Lead').first().json.icp_match, auto_reply: null }) }}
